name: Okeanis Eco Tankers
longBusinessSummary: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp., a shipping company, owns and operates tanker vessels worldwide. It operates a fleet of 14 tanker vessels comprising six modern Suezmax tankers and eight modern VLCC tankers focusing on the transportation of crude oil. Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Neo Faliro, Greece.
